Fetches every brand document from MongoDB and bulk-indexes them into Elasticsearch with the full brand mapping. Safe to call multiple times — re-creates the index each time.

schema.title: Response Brands Indexing Api V1 Brands Index Post

get.summary: Get personalised brand recommendations for the authenticated customer
get.description: Reads the customer's occasions and aesthetics preferences from their profile, then runs an Elasticsearch BM25 search and returns all matching brands sorted by relevance. If the customer has no preferences set, returns all brands sorted by newest first.

schema.title: Response Brand Recommendations Api V1 Brands Recommendations Get

post.description:
Indexes product documents from MongoDB into Elasticsearch with OpenAI embeddings for hybrid BM25 + kNN search.

**`incremental=false` (default — full reindex):**  Deletes and recreates the index, embeds every product. Use for first-time setup or after bulk data changes.

**`incremental=true` (fast daily sync):**  Keeps the existing index, checks which product IDs are already indexed via ES mget, and only embeds + indexes NEW products. For a 100 k catalogue with 500 new products added today this takes seconds, not minutes.

parameters.name: incremental

schema.description: false = full reindex (delete + recreate, embed all products). true  = incremental sync (only embed + index products not yet in ES).
schema.title: Incremental

parameters.description: false = full reindex (delete + recreate, embed all products). true  = incremental sync (only embed + index products not yet in ES).

schema.title: Response Products Indexing Api V1 Products Index Post

post.summary: Get personalised product recommendations for the authenticated customer
post.description:
Runs a hybrid BM25 + kNN cosine search (35 % / 65 % weights) against the Elasticsearch product index. All request fields are **optional** — omitting a field simply disables the corresponding filter or personalisation step.

**Personalisation logic:**
- If `user_product_ids` are supplied, their embeddings are averaged into a taste vector used for kNN.
- If no product IDs are given but `user_preferences` are set, preference keywords are embedded instead.
- Products in `user_product_ids` are always excluded from the results.

**Filters applied:**  `is_active=true`, `is_low_stock=false`, optional price range, optional `brand_id`, optional `collection_name`.

schema.title: Response Product Recommendations Api V1 Products Recommendations Post

BrandUpdateRequest.title: BrandUpdateRequest
BrandUpdateRequest.description:
All fields are optional. Dict fields (email_notification, push_notification)
accept partial payloads — only the provided keys are merged into the stored value.

CalendarEventResponse.title: CalendarEventResponse
CalendarEventResponse.description: API response for a calendar event.

CollectionUpdateRequest.title: CollectionUpdateRequest
CollectionUpdateRequest.description: All fields optional. Only provided fields are updated.

EventUpdateRequest.title: EventUpdateRequest
EventUpdateRequest.description: All fields optional. product_list replaces the whole list when provided.

ManualEventCreate.title: ManualEventCreate
ManualEventCreate.description: Payload for adding an event manually.

user_product_ids.title: User Product Ids
user_product_ids.description: Combined product IDs from past orders, wishlist, and wardrobe. These products are excluded from results and used to build the taste vector.

filter_brand_id.title: Filter Brand Id
filter_brand_id.description: Restrict results to a single brand ID.

filter_collection_name.title: Filter Collection Name
filter_collection_name.description: Restrict results to an exact collection name.

ProductUpdateRequest.title: ProductUpdateRequest
ProductUpdateRequest.description:
All fields are optional. Scalar fields replace in place.
product_images / regional_stocks replace the whole list when provided.
performance_metrics supports partial update — only supplied keys are merged.

id_token.title: Id Token
id_token.description: Firebase ID token obtained after signing in on the client side.

StoryUpdateRequest.title: StoryUpdateRequest
StoryUpdateRequest.description: All fields optional. content / product_list replace whole list when provided.
